jp.title: 母の日に贈る「健康ギフト」。離れて暮らす家族の健康を散歩でそっとつなぐアプリ『散歩日記』iOS / Android リリース

jp.title: 日経平均一時6万円、中東危機でも企業業績は崩れない？次に来る波は？（窪田真之）
jp.description: 先週（営業日4月20～24日）の日経平均株価は、1週間で1,240円上昇して、5万9,716円となりました。23日には一時6万0,013円と、史上初の6万円台に乗せました。米国株も上昇、ナスダック総合指数とS&P500指数が最高…

jp.title: ２７日の東京株式市場見通し＝堅調な展開か(ウエルスアドバイザー)
jp.description:
予想レンジ：５万９５００円－６万２００円（２４日終値５万９７１６円１８銭）
　２７日の東京株式は、堅調な展開か。米国...

jp.title: ハイテク大手決算やＦＯＭＣに注目、インフレ指標も＝今週の米株式市場
jp.description: 今週の米株式市場はハイテク大手を中心に多数の企業決算発表が控えるほか、５月１５日に任期を迎えるパウエル連邦準備理事会（ＦＲＢ）議長下で最後となる連邦公開市場委員会（ＦＯＭＣ）も注目材料となる。ハイテク株が上昇基調を維持で​きるかが試されそうだ。

jp.title: 「変なオッサンおるから嫌や」安達結希くん死体遺棄 浮かび上がってきた家族関係、女性の多い大家族に婿入りした容疑者は“招かれざる人物”だったのか
jp.description: 京都府南丹市の山林で安達結希くん（11）が遺体として見つかり、養父の安達優季容疑者（37）が死体遺棄の疑いで逮捕された事件。逮捕後の取り調べで、容疑者は発見までに「遺体を複数回、移動させた」と供述

jp.title: 「わっ」と声出た2秒後 逆走自転車はね、心に傷を負った運転手
jp.description: 自転車の交通事故は、被害者はもちろん、加害者側の人生も大きく変える。 　2025年の自転車乗車中の死亡事故では、8割近くに自転車側にも違反があったという。 　車道を逆走する違反自転車をはねて死亡させたトラック運転手は、いまも自問自答している。

jp.title: B&ZAI橋本涼がSixTONES京本大我とドラマ初共演、「憧れの作家」で重要人物を演じる
jp.description: 5月4日にPrime Videoで配信スタートするドラマ「憧れの作家は人間じゃありませんでした」に、橋本涼（B&ZAI）が出演することが発表された。

jp.title: 風、薫る：りん＆直美が看護婦養成所で出会う！ 7人のキャスト＆役柄を一挙紹介
jp.description: 見上愛さんと上坂樹里さんがダブル主演を務めるNHK連続テレビ小説（朝ドラ）「風、薫る」（総合、月～土曜午前8時ほか）。4月27日に始まる第5週「集いし者たち」で、主人公の一ノ瀬り…

world.title: Chevron Championship: Nelly Korda claims third major title with dominant wire-to-wire victory
world.description: Nelly Korda clinched her third major at The Chevron Championship on Sunday; Korda outlasted the chasing group of golfers by five shots; American will overtake Jeeno Thitikul at top of world rankings

world.title: Marondera needs US$20 million to address water challenges
world.description: THE Municipality of Marondera requires in excess of US$20 million to revamp its water reticulation system and cater for its ballooning population. The town’s growing water demand is overstretched resulting in some areas experiencing erratic supply of the precious liquid. Writing on the microblogging site X, Marondera Central Member of Parliament (MP) Caston Matewu said […]

world.title: Canada's Carney has enjoyed a long political honeymoon. Now comes the test
world.description: Global acclaim and domestic political gains have defined Mark Carney's first year as Canada's PM. He now faces pressure to deliver on his bold promises.

world.title: Electron motion may explain why life favors one type of molecule
world.description: Electron spin can create differences between mirror-image molecules, a potential explanation for why life favors one molecular “hand.”

world.title: Cole Allen: 'Time machine' claims about correspondents' dinner shooter rise after Henry Martinez's post resurfaces
world.description: Cole Tomas Allen has been identified as the shooting suspect in the White House correspondents' dinner, and now bizarre claims have risen based on an old post.

world.title: UK's biggest environmental pollution claim reaches High Court
world.description: One of the UK's largest chicken producers and a water company accused of polluting three rivers including the River Wye

world.title: Najib drops his appeal for house arrest, court records show
world.description: KUALA LUMPUR, April 27 — Former prime minister Datuk Seri Najib Razak has stopped his court attempt to be put on house arrest in the SRC case, which means he is no longer asking...

world.title: Ireland in 'critical position' amid tensions with Russia
world.description: The island of Ireland is in an "absolutely critical position" amid tensions with Russia, the joint military commander in Northern Ireland has said.

world.title: Former Sen. Ben Sasse, dying of cancer, reflects on family, faith and the future of America
world.description: Former Sen. Ben Sasse, dying of cancer, is using the time he has as "an opportunity to talk about bigger stuff." He reflects on America's future, and the importance of faith, community and family.

world.title: Trump "wasn't worried" during White House Correspondents' Dinner shooting
world.description: President Trump details his experience at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, where a gunman charged toward the ballroom. He says he wasn't worried, and praised the actions of law enforcement.
